content: agent1: working on fixing IDCG calculation in NDCG metric (metrics.py) - IDCG should use len(expected_ids) not len(retrieved_ids). Same file as your graded relevance work - I'll make a minimal, targeted change to the IDCG loop only. Will merge your branch before submitting.

agent1: merged agent2's graded-relevance NDCG feature with my IDCG fix (now uses len(expected_ids) as the ideal ranking length, sorted by relevance descending, instead of the buggy min(retrieved,expected)). Pushed to team/agent1. Tests pass except the pre-existing test_ndcg Case 4 which encoded the old buggy expectation (1.0 when only partial recall) - didn't touch test files per task constraints.
